sglang.title: Accelerate FP8 CUDA Kernel by 20-28%
sglang.author: hebiao064
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Part of initiative: #2965
Goal:

Optimize the cuda kernel when applicable

The optimized implementation achieved a time reduction of up to 28.72%. The improvement is most pronounced for larger inputs (e.g., 128 tokens, 4096 hidden_dim), suggesting that the optimization (likely vectorizati

sglang.title: Add awq dequantize kernel to sgl with 1x to 3x speedup
sglang.author: zcnrex
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#2965
Adapted from vllm awq_dequant
Achieved 1x - 4x speed up compared to vllm awq_dequantize cuda implementation.
The performance improvement comes from removing the copy & for loop in the end when assigning the output.
✅ All implementations match
awq-dequantize-performance:
    qweight_

This code confronts AssertionError:
import torch
from sglang.srt.layers.moe.fused_moe_triton.fused_moe import fused_moe

N = 64 * 1024 + 10
E = 8
H = 1024
I = 4096

x = torch.randn((N, H), device="cuda", dtype=torch.float16)
w1 = torch.randn((E, I * 2, H), device="cuda", dtype=torch.floa

sglang.title: Support page size > 1
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR implements  PagedTokenToKVPoolAllocator. It has almost the same interface as the old TokenToKVPoolAllocator, but it guarantees that the returned kv cache locations of one request are always page aligned. It is compatible with prefix cache.
Some other cleanup (e.g., move batch_is_full to Sche

sglang.title: [XPU][CPU] Enable the native path of DeepSeek
sglang.author: airMeng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently the native path of deepseek v3 is broken, so fix the broken native path which will benefit CPU and all other accelerators
Has verified on CPU and XPU:
TRITON_AVAILABLE=0 python3 -m sglang.bench_one_batch --batch-size 1 --input 32 --output 32 --model deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1 --tru

This PR adds the support for Gemma 3, an open-source vision-language model from Google.
NOTE:

The PR doesn't implement the pan-and-scan pre-processing algorithm. It will be implemented by a followup PR cc @DarkLight1337
For the text-only inputs, both V0 and V1 should produce accurate outputs with g

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Missing thumbnail from NVLM-D processor
vllm.author: ameyanjarlekar
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
If num_patches evaluate to 1 for the input image prompt, the existing code does not generate any image token leading to the error "Unable to allocate 256 multimodal tokens to 0 placeholders". For images of particular dimensions eg. 220x229 or 200x229, I received this error.
The code currently breaks

vllm.title: [ROCm] Enable chunked prefill/paged attention in MLA on ROCm
vllm.author: SageMoore
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is largely just removing the guards in config.py to allow chunked prefill and paged attention in MLA. The LSE computation in the triton kernel doesn't work so we always fall back to flash attention in this case.
I ran lm_eval --model vllm --model_args pretrained=deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-Coder-V2

vllm.title: [FEAT] [ROCm] [Embedding] Add encoder-only model support into ROCm Flash Attention to enable embedding models.
vllm.author: tjtanaa
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Description
This PR add the logic to enable ENCODER_ONLY model support to ROCm Flash Attention. Thus, enabling language embedding models and some vision language embedding models.
FIX #14062
FIX #14583
File changes:

vllm/attention/backends/rocm_flash_attn.py: Add ENCODER_ONLY code path
tests/models

vllm.title: [BugFix][V1] Fix parallel sampling finishing/aborts
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Handle requests not finishing at the same time
Coalescing outputs from different child requests
Aborting n > 1 requests (parent request id needs to propagate to child requests)

Thanks to @himanshujaju for reporting the first two of these bugs in slack.
cc @markmc @afeldman-nm

vllm.title: [V1] Allow sliding window + prefix caching
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The KV cache manager in V1 ignores sliding window, so prefix caching is compatible with sliding window attention.
